summary: Iter27 verification of empty-repo fix + sidebar fix_review filter + initial-push endpoint + ViewPreviewButton position fix. Backend: 11/11 PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_iter27_empty_repo_and_sidebar.py — initial-push endpoint contract (anon→401/403, unknown project→404, project-without-repo→412), chat/sessions filter (fix_review session inserted into mongo NOT returned in listing), /deploy short-circuit (412 with error='repo_empty' + initial_push_url + can_auto_push=true when last_code_review.verdict='repo_empty'), code_review.run_code_review fast-path (patched fetch_repo_snapshot returns README+LICENSE only → verdict='repo_empty', can_auto_push=True, second_opinion.reviewer_model='skipped', and _second_opinion was patched to raise so we proved zero LLM calls), visual-verify endpoint regression (anon 401/403, unknown plan 404), baseline regression (deploy/projects, ai-build/history, auto-fix/status). Frontend Playwright verified: (1) Operator login via /api/auth/login returns token + requires_2fa_setup=true; direct nav to /dashboard with token in localStorage renders the dashboard (body text 1153 chars, no white screen); (2) ViewPreviewButton (data-testid='view-preview-fab') visible with href='https://tbctools.org', class contains 'bottom-20', bbox y=960 (above 'Made with the platform' badge at ~y=1050); (3) Sidebar listing 3 user chats — NO 'Fix review:' entries leaked (filter live-verified end-to-end); (4) /operator?tab=ai-build loads, [data-testid='ai-build-history'] present, 1 VisualVerifyChip with testid 'ai-build-visual-verify-plan_opened_1781401185337'. In-chat handleInlineAction 'Pick a deploy project first…' toast confirmed verbatim in /app/frontend/src/pages/dashboard/useInlineChatActions.js line 44; live click NOT exercised (same constraint as iter25/iter26: no AI keys to create assistant messages in preview).

issues: Hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' still emitted (already documented in iter26 — pure cosmetic, no functional impact).

action_items: (INFO) In-chat handleInlineAction live-click flow (chat bubble or EndOfSessionActions Health with no project) NOT exercised live for the 3rd consecutive iteration — same blocker: preview account has no assistant chat messages and no AI key configured. Code in /app/frontend/src/pages/dashboard/useInlineChatActions.js:44 matches spec verbatim ('Pick a deploy project first (use the dropdown in the chat header).'); main agent can self-verify by issuing a chat reply and clicking EOS Health with localStorage.removeItem('tbc.inChat.selectedProjectId').
(INFO, optional) Cosmetic hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' on /operator?tab=ai-build — carried over from iter26.
critical_code_review_comments: deploy_initial_push_ext.py: clean contract — operator-gated via Depends(get_current_operator); 404 on missing project; 412 when project.repo is empty (humane message); 503 when github_token absent; 502 with actionable message when branch doesn't exist on remote; tries main→master fallback before bailing. _gather_files walks /app/backend + /app/frontend with sensible exclusions (node_modules/.git/.env). Existing-file SHA preserved for overwrite via PUT — Contents API contract respected. Base64 encoding uses base64.b64encode(data).decode('ascii') — correct. Per-file httpx call inside async client (no parallelism, but acceptable for an initial-push one-shot).

deploy/code_review.py lines 290-344: the fast-path is correctly positioned BEFORE any LLM-touching code. Filter list ('readme.md/.rst', 'license/.md/.txt', '.gitignore', '.gitattributes', 'code_of_conduct.md', 'contributing.md', 'security.md', '.env.example') is comprehensive — case-insensitive via .lower(). Verdict body includes can_auto_push=True, missing_files hint, files_sampled, repo+ref, and a skipped second_opinion stub — frontend has everything to render the one-click push dialog. Project doc is updated with last_code_review immediately after, so the /deploy short-circuit (line 803) reads consistent state.

deploy_projects_ext.py lines 799-822: repo_empty branch evaluated BEFORE do_not_ship, so an empty-repo project no longer falls into the 'Fix review:' chat creation path (no more credit burn). Body shape exactly matches spec: error='repo_empty', message, review echo, initial_push_url, can_auto_push=true.

deploy_projects_ext.py lines 727-744 + server.py lines 919-934: _create_fix_review_chat stamps kind='fix_review' on insertion; list_sessions uses Mongo $ne filter — single round-trip, no collection scan needed if 'kind' isn't indexed (could be added for scale but not required at current volume).

useInlineChatActions.js (191 lines): faithful Dashboard.jsx extraction. handleInlineAction:44 toast text matches spec verbatim. The new repo_empty branch (line 98) prompts a confirm dialog then calls runInitialPush — correct UX given the operator action is destructive (pushes to a real GitHub repo).

ViewPreviewButton.jsx: bottom-20 confirmed live (bbox y=960 on 1080-tall viewport, badge at y~1050). Lookup order is correct (selected → first-with-url). Silent hide when nothing configured — better than rendering a broken link.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on sidebar filter (live), FAB position+href (live), AI Build history+VisualVerifyChip (live), dashboard no-crash. In-chat toast text code-reviewed only — same blocker as iter25/26.

test_credentials: Operator rac.investments.swe@gmail.com / REDACTED. Login returns 200 + requires_2fa_setup=true; the legacy token in body is used as Authorization: Bearer for non-browser callers; cookie tbc_session is also set so browser nav to /dashboard works without 2FA enrol when RESET_OPERATOR_PASSWORD=true is active.
seed_data_creation: Inserted+cleaned (via finally blocks): 1 deploy_projects doc with empty repo (TEST_iter27_norepo_*), 1 deploy_projects with last_code_review.verdict='repo_empty' (TEST_iter27_empty_*), 1 normal + 1 fix_review chat_sessions (TEST_iter27_normal_*, TEST_iter27_fix_*), 1 deploy_projects for code_review unit test (TEST_iter27_cr_*). All removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter27 regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter27_empty_repo_and_sidebar.py — 11 tests covering initial-push contract, sidebar fix_review filter, /deploy repo_empty short-circuit, code_review fast-path (with LLM-call-blocking monkeypatch), visual-verify regression, baseline regression. The code_review fast-path test patches cr._second_opinion to raise — if a future change reintroduces an LLM call before the empty-repo check, the test fails immediately. Spec note: do NOT run the initial-push endpoint against a real configured project on Richiie86/tbc-ai-tools — it would actually push code. All tests use TEST_-prefixed bogus project IDs to avoid that. The only flow still not exercised live (3rd iteration in a row) is the EOS bar 'Pick a deploy project first' toast — main agent can self-test by sending a chat message + clearing localStorage.tbc.inChat.selectedProjectId + clicking Health.
rca of the issue: N/A — all iter27 scope verified passing. The user-reported 'credit-burn loop' RCA (now closed): empty repo → code_review.run_code_review → fetch_repo_snapshot returns just README → previously fell through to LLM-based reviewer which (correctly given the prompt) said 'do_not_ship' → _trigger_deploy raised 412 review_blocked → frontend created Fix review chat → user clicked Deploy again → loop. Fix is two-layered: (a) code_review.py short-circuits to verdict='repo_empty' BEFORE any LLM call when only README/LICENSE files exist; (b) _trigger_deploy checks for verdict=='repo_empty' BEFORE the do_not_ship branch and surfaces a 412 with initial_push_url so the frontend renders a one-click push dialog instead of a fix chat. Both layers verified live + unit-tested. Sidebar pollution from prior fix chats is hidden via the new kind!='fix_review' filter in list_sessions.
